backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing parish management system with paginated queries, CRUD operations for parishioners, localities, budget transactions, events, notes, statistics, baptism records, and collective offerings with automatic budget synchronization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implementation of collective offerings functionality across Miejscowości and Budzet sections with automatic budget synchronization.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components and pages including dialogs, management pages, hooks, and PDF generation utilities with implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles with OKLCH color system defining navy-gold theme variables for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the parish registry application of Saint John the Baptist Church in Zbrosza Duża.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component managing authentication flow, profile setup, theme provider, error boundaries, and conditional rendering of login or main layout.
frontend/src/components/BaptismRecordDia: Dialog component for creating and editing baptism records with comprehensive form fields for act details, baptized person, parents, and later annotations using mutations from useQueries hook.
frontend/src/components/BudgetDialog.tsx: Dialog component for creating and editing budget transactions with fields for type (income/expense), amount, date, category, description, and optional parishioner/locality relations.
frontend/src/components/CollectiveOfferi: Dialog component for managing collective offerings with fields for amount, date/year, description, and locality, using a calendar picker for date selection.
Diagnostic tool component that runs health checks on URL parameters, backend actor initialization, backend connectivity, and browser environment features, displaying results with status badges.
frontend/src/components/EventDialog.tsx: Dialog component for creating and editing events with title, date, description, and a dynamic list of tasks that can be added or removed.
frontend/src/components/ExportPdfModeCon: Reusable dropdown button component that provides two PDF export modes: export all records or export a single selected record, with loading states and error handling.
frontend/src/components/FunctionAssignme: Dialog component for managing parish function assignments with fields for title, description, address, assigned parishioner, and a dynamic list of contact entries.
frontend/src/components/FunctionLocality: Dialog component for creating/editing parish function locality assignments with fields for locality name, description, assigned parishioners, and dynamic contact list management.
frontend/src/components/IndividualOfferi: Dialog component for adding/editing individual parishioner offerings with amount, date picker (using date-fns Polish locale), description, and automatic year/timestamp handling.
frontend/src/components/LetterDialog.tsx: Dialog component for creating/editing parish letters with title and body fields, displaying letter number in edit mode (KP-YYYY-NNN format), and noting EB Garamond font for PDF export.
frontend/src/components/LocalityDialog.t: Dialog component for managing localities with fields for name (disabled when editing), contact person, phone, and dynamic task list management.
frontend/src/components/MainLayout.tsx: Main application layout with responsive sidebar navigation, theme toggle, user profile display, logout functionality, and routing between 10 sections (dashboard, kartoteka, miejscowosci, budzet, wydarzenia, funkcje, statystyki, uwagi, korespondencja, chrzty).
frontend/src/components/NoteDialog.tsx: Dialog component for creating/editing parish notes with title, date picker, and content textarea, handling timestamp conversion between Date and BigInt nanoseconds.
frontend/src/components/ParishionerDialo: Dialog component for creating/editing parishioner records with tabs for personal info, family members, sacraments, offerings, and pastoral notes. Manages individual offerings through CRUD operations and integrates with backend queries.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for initial user profile setup that collects name and role, preventing dismissal until profile is saved. Uses mutation hook to save caller user profile to backend.
frontend/src/components/StartupErrorBoun: React error boundary component that catches and displays startup errors with detailed error messages, stack traces, and a reload button. Provides a user-friendly error UI when the application fails to initialize.
Dialog component for creating/editing statistical entries with fields for date, Sunday attendance count, and communion count. Handles BigInt conversions for timestamp and numeric values.
frontend/src/components/UnhandledErrorLi: Component that listens for unhandled errors and promise rejections globally, forwarding them to a callback handler. Sets up and cleans up window event listeners for error tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state. Initializes access control with admin token and invalidates dependent queries when actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle. Provides login/logout functions and status tracking for authentication flow.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend API operations including parishioners, localities, budget transactions, events, baptism records, offerings, letters, anniversaries, and user profiles with pagination, mutations, and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme color schemes, including sidebar, chart, and UI component colors using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/lib/pdfGenerator.ts: Provides PDF generation utilities for parish documents including baptism certificates, registry lists, and other reports with parish branding, logo, biblical quotes, and auto-print functionality.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient provider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication.
frontend/src/pages/BaptismsRegistry.tsx: Baptism registry page with table view, search, sorting, pagination, CRUD operations via dialog, and PDF export for individual certificates or full registry list.
frontend/src/pages/Budzet.tsx: Budget management page displaying monthly and yearly income/expense transactions with pagination, filtering by date range, CRUD operations, and summary statistics with PDF export.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard displaying parish statistics including parishioner counts with sacrament data, budget balance, upcoming events, and paginated anniversaries with filtering and PDF export.
frontend/src/pages/FunkcjeParafialne.tsx: Parish function assignments page with tabs for individual and locality-based assignments, supporting CRUD operations, pagination, and PDF export for both assignment types.
frontend/src/pages/Kartoteka.tsx: Parishioner registry page with card/list view modes, search functionality, pagination, and PDF export capabilities for individual parishioners and the full registry.
frontend/src/pages/Korespondencja.tsx: Correspondence management page for creating, editing, and deleting letters with automatic numbering (KP-YEAR-NUMBER format) and PDF generation for individual letters or all correspondence.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page with Internet Identity authentication, parish branding, and a diagnostics dialog for system troubleshooting.
frontend/src/pages/Miejscowosci.tsx: Localities management page with pagination, CRUD operations for localities and collective offerings, resident listings, and PDF export functionality.
frontend/src/pages/Statystyki.tsx: Statistics page displaying parish metrics including total parishioner count, sacrament counts, and custom statistic entries with CRUD operations and PDF export.
frontend/src/pages/Uwagi.tsx: Parish notes management page with paginated list view, CRUD operations (add/edit/delete), and PDF export functionality for all notes.
frontend/src/pages/Wydarzenia.tsx: Events management page with pagination, CRUD operations, selectable cards, and PDF export for all events or a single selected event.
frontend/src/utils/anniversaries.ts: Utility functions for computing and formatting parishioner anniversaries (baptism, marriage, funeral) with priority-based selection logic.
frontend/src/utils/baptismRecord.ts: Utility functions for baptism record date conversions (ISO to nanoseconds), empty object creation, and payload normalization for form submissions.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: URL parameter parsing utilities supporting both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence for parameters like admin tokens.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system, extended theme tokens for UI components (sidebar, chart, card), and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for Parish Manager application showing existing features for collective offerings management in localities and budget sections. Contains pending feature requests for collective offerings tab and backend storage, with a known build failure issue noted.
